name: watch-ci
description: Real-time GitHub Actions CI monitoring with auto-exit on completion. Watch your CI pipeline's progress with live status updates, job tracking, and color-coded results. Perfect for staying in flow - push code, start the watcher, and get notified when CI completes (pass or fail). Supports custom polling intervals.
longDescription:
This plugin continuously monitors GitHub Actions workflows for the current branch, providing real-time feedback without manual checks. When you run watch-ci after pushing code:
- Polls GitHub Actions API at configurable intervals (default: 10s)
- Displays workflow and job status with color coding
- Shows check names, states, and completion times
- Auto-exits when all checks complete
- Returns appropriate exit codes for scripting

Ideal for:
- Waiting for CI before merging PRs
- Catching failures quickly without browser switching
- Automating workflows with CI status dependencies
features: Works with any GitHub Actions workflow
usageExamples: watch-ci - Monitor CI for current branch (10s intervals)
Workflow: git push && watch-ci - Push and watch

requiresSetup.ghCLI: Install GitHub CLI: brew install gh
requiresSetup.repository: Must be in a git repository with GitHub remote
